buckler.name: Buckler
buckler.description: A small, round shield. Lightweight but basic. +1 to AC and damage resistance.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.description: A crude shield made from planks of wood. +1 to AC.

shield.name: Shield
shield.description: A standard wooden shield with iron banding. +2 to AC and +1 to damage resistance.

kite_shield.name: Kite Shield
kite_shield.description: A large shield providing excellent coverage. +3 to AC and +2 to damage resistance.

arcane_ward.name: Arcane Ward
arcane_ward.description: A shield etched with runes that improve spell success. +2 to AC and Mana, +1 to damage resistance, spell DC and spell resistance.

sturdy_targe.name: Sturdy Targe
sturdy_targe.description: A combat shield designed for endurance. +2 to AC, damage resistance and Stamina.

dragon_scale_shield.name: Dragon Scale Shield
dragon_scale_shield.description: A legendary shield made from the scales of a red dragon. +3 to AC and damage resistance, +2 to spell resistance and spell DC.
